title: AI could spot kidney disease earlier and predict decline before symptoms appear
description: Kidney diseases develop slowly and may not produce any obvious symptoms for a long time. The body can compensate for them so effectively that the patient remains unaware of the problem for years. It is only in more advanced stages that symptoms appear—often nonspecific ones, such as fatigue or swelling.
